description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a geometric, angular facade. The front features a prominent balcony with glass railings, large horizontal windows, and a recessed entryway accessed by a short set of steps. The exterior combines light and dark panels, creating a striking contrast, and the house is surrounded by a rectangular boundary wall enclosing a spacious yard. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing privacy. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on functional outdoor space.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, angular facade, large windows, and a spacious enclosed yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, balcony with glass railings, large windows, and steps leading to the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular balcony, glass features, and the boundary wall extending around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows and a plain facade, emphasizing privacy and the extent of the yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid wall, limited window openings, and the continuation of the boundary wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal windows and a prominent balcony window
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with steps, modern door, and a balcony above; no porch or columns, minimal overhang.
